positive_prompt: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. character.light_warrior is a brave human champion channeling luminous guardian power, with white-gold/dawn-blue heroic readability. Style: project style guide. Game: Light Warrior. Core loop: see GAME_DESIGN.md.
negative_prompt: generic, muddy, unreadable, over-detailed, off-theme, low gameplay readability
style_rules: Prioritize gameplay camera readability over decorative detail.
Preserve the project hook and player-facing cause/effect.
